{"rule":"UPPERCASE_SENTENCE_START","sentence":"^\\Qpowerpc diverges significantly: it doesn't include the generic \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q at all, and independently defines \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, not generic's \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q), \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, not \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q), and \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q/\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q/\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q/\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q/\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, not \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q/\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q/\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q), and has no \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q equivalent at all.\\E$"}
{"rule":"UPPERCASE_SENTENCE_START","sentence":"^\\Qpowerpc diverges significantly: it doesn't include the generic \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q at all, and independently defines \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, not generic's \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q), \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, not \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q), and \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q/ \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q/\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q/\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q/\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, not \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q/\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q/\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q), and has no \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q equivalent at all.\\E$"}
